title: Comforting Crunchy Italian Almond Panforte
description: A traditional Italian dessert featuring coriander seeds and almonds, with a crunchy texture and comforting flavor, made keto-friendly by using almond flour and sweetened with sugar-free honey.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the almond flour, coriander seeds, and sliced almonds.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the sugar-free honey, coconut oil, eggs, and vanilla extract until well emulsified.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
Press the dough into a 9-inch round pan lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 25 minutes or until the edges are lightly golden.
Remove from the oven and let cool completely before slicing and serving.
To enhance the crunch, bake the panforte for an additional 5 minutes after slicing.
